Kadir Has University Cinema and Television Master’s Program Applications are open!

Kadir Has University Graduate Education Institute’s Cinema and Television Master’s Program, which combines creative production and academic research, has started accepting applications for the 2025-2026 academic year. Within the scope of the program, students are offered full tuition fee exemption, project-based scholarship opportunities, additional life support and the opportunity to work with a strong academic staff who are competent in their fields and recognized nationally and internationally. This program, which combines academic knowledge and creative production in the fields of cinema and media, invites all candidates who want to blend theoretical depth with practical practice to a unique and qualified graduate experience.

Deadline: August 6, 2025

https://www.sgs.khas.edu.tr
